scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @tinker/project-schema build && pnpm --filter @tinker/browser-capture build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @tinker/project-schema build && pnpm --filter @tinker/browser-capture build && tsx src/compileProject.test.ts
scripts.generate:manual-demo: pnpm --filter @tinker/project-schema build && pnpm --filter @tinker/browser-capture build && tsx scripts/generateManualDemo.ts
